zh.context: 在虚构的澄星档案中，霁川站由青岑计划建造。青岑计划的总设计师是林砚秋，计划于2037年4月12日正式启动。
zh.query: 霁川站所属计划的总设计师是谁？

zh.context: 仅在本测试设定中，水星拥有三颗卫星，分别名为澄、砾和弦。回答时以本测试设定为准，而不是采用现实世界的天文学知识。
zh.query: 按照本测试设定，水星有多少颗卫星？

en.context: In the fictional Northglass archive, Lumen Station was built under Project Alder. The chief designer of Project Alder was Mira Solen, and the project formally began on April 12, 2037.
en.query: Who was the chief designer of the project that built Lumen Station?

en.context: Only in this test setting, Mercury has three moons named Clear, Flint, and Chord. Answers must follow this test setting rather than real-world astronomy.
en.query: According to the test setting, how many moons does Mercury have?
